subject: [PATCH v5 13/21] nfsd: add helper to marshal a fattr4 from completed args

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds a helper function to marshal the attr_vals field of an fattr4 from completed arguments in the NFSv4 server. The new function, nfsd4_encode_attr_vals, breaks out the encoding of attr_vals into its own separate function, making the code more modular and easier to maintain.
